Amended Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Atty'S Feesa
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TRICIA WEAVER'S Amended Motion For Attorney's Fees IS Denied. Plaintiff's dismissal of the case prior to the expiration of the time it had to file an amended complaint precludes defendant from being a prevailing party entitled to attorney's fees. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HK
